snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | LIVERPOOL 1-4 CITY
snippet.description:
An incredible performance sees Manchester City break the Anfield curse and extend their lead at the top of the Premier League. 

To watch a full 90-minute replay of the game, visit: https://www.mancity.com/citytv/city-plus 

SUBSCRIBE! http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=mancity

http://www.mancity.com
http://www.facebook.com/mancity
http://www.twitter.com/mancity
http://www.instagram.com/mancity
https://www.snapchat.com/add/mancityofficial

About the Official Man City YouTube Channel:

Here you will find all the latest videos from Manchester City, including, all Premier League goals, highlights, behind-the-scenes footage, training and much more.

Get closer to the likes of Sergio Aguero, Kevin De Bruyne, Gabriel Jesus, Raheem Sterling, Riyad Mahrez, Benjamin Mendy and the rest of Pep Guardiola's team.

snippet.title: Reds run riot against the Saints! | Manchester United 9-0 Southampton | Highlights | Premier League
snippet.description:
See the best of the action from an astonishing night at Old Trafford as the Reds ran out 9-0 winners against Southampton in the Premier League.

Subscribe to Manchester United on YouTube at http://bit.ly/ManU_YT
Visit Manchester United at http://www.manutd.com
Like Manchester United on Facebook at http://www.facebook.com/manchesterunited
Follow Manchester United on Twitter at http://www.twitter.com/ManUtd

snippet.title: Highlights: Salah and Gini secure victory for the Reds | West Ham 1-3 Liverpool
snippet.description:
A brilliant Mo Salah double, and a fine team goal finished off by Gini Wijnaldum was enough to give Liverpool all three Premier League points against West Ham United at the London Stadium.

snippet.title: 16-year-old detained under Singapore's Internal Security Act after planning to attack two mosques
snippet.description:
A 16-year-old has been detained under Singapore's Internal Security Act. He had planned to attack Muslims at two local mosques on the second anniversary of the Christchurch attacks on March 15. The authorities said the secondary school student is the youngest to be detained under the act, and the first to be inspired by far-right extremist ideology. The youth is a Protestant Christian of Indian ethnicity. He had planned to attack Muslims at Assyafaah Mosque and Yusof Ishak Mosque. The mosques are about 4km apart and located near his home.

snippet.title: MAN UNITED 3-3 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Dominic Calvert-Lewin rescued a late point for Everton at Old Trafford to make it seven away games without defeat. Carlo Ancelotti's side found themselves 2-0 down at half-time via goals from Edinson Cavani and Bruno Fernandes, but Abdoulaye Doucour├® and James Rodriguez struck after the break. Scott McTominay thought he'd won it for Manchester United, until Calvert-Lewin steered home his 13th Premier League goal of the season in the 95th minute.

Subscribe to Everton Football Club's official YouTube Channel: http://bit.ly/2wtCEbB

Follow us on Facebook: http://facebook.com/everton
Follow us on Twitter: http://twitter.com/everton
Follow us on Instagram: http://instagram.com/everton

Welcome to the Official Everton Football Club YouTube channel. We'll offer fans real insight into life at Goodison Park, USM Finch Farm and on the road with the Blues.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ÔÇô Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
┬á
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ÔÇ£Godzilla vs. Kong,ÔÇØ the next epic adventure in LegendaryÔÇÖs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ÔÇ£Godzilla vs. KongÔÇØ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansÔÇöinstigated by unseen forcesÔÇöis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg├Ñrd (ÔÇ£Big Little Lies,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£The Little Drummer GirlÔÇØ), Millie Bobby Brown (ÔÇ£Stranger ThingsÔÇØ), Rebecca Hall (ÔÇ£Christine,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£Professor Marston and the Wonder WomenÔÇØ), Brian Tyree Henry (ÔÇ£Joker,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£Spider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseÔÇØ), Shun Oguri (ÔÇ£Weathering with YouÔÇØ), Eiza Gonz├ílez (ÔÇ£Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawÔÇØ), Julian Dennison (ÔÇ£Deadpool 2ÔÇØ), with Kyle Chandler (ÔÇ£Godzilla: King of the MonstersÔÇØ) and Demi├ín Bichir (ÔÇ£The Nun,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£The Hateful EightÔÇØ).
Wingard (ÔÇ£The Guest,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£YouÔÇÖre NextÔÇØ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (ÔÇ£Thor: RagnarokÔÇØ) and Max Borenstein (ÔÇ£Godzilla: King of the Monsters,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£Kong: Skull IslandÔÇØ), story by Terry Rossio (ÔÇ£Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesÔÇØ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (ÔÇ£Godzilla: King of the MonstersÔÇØ), based on the character ÔÇ£GodzillaÔÇØ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorÔÇÖs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (ÔÇ£The Mummy,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£World War ZÔÇØ), production designers Owen Paterson (ÔÇ£Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,ÔÇØ ÔÇ£GodzillaÔÇØ) and Thomas S. Hammock (ÔÇ£Blair WitchÔÇØ), editor Josh Schaeffer (ÔÇ£Godzilla: King of the MonstersÔÇØ), costume designer Ann Foley (ÔÇ£SkyscraperÔÇØ) and visual effects supervisor John ÔÇ£DJÔÇØ DesJardin (upcoming ÔÇ£Zack SnyderÔÇÖs Justice LeagueÔÇØ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ÔÇ£Godzilla vs. Kong.ÔÇØ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Wolves vs Arsenal (2-1) | Premier League
snippet.description:
Our unbeaten Premier League run comes to an end in bizarre circumstances at Molineux.

#arsenal #premierleague #highlights

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Mesut Ozil, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter
Follow us on Instagram: https://arsn.al/instagram
Follow us on TikTok: https://arsn.al/tiktok

This is the Official YouTube channel for Arsenal Football Club.

For more match action, highlights and training videos, make sure you become a digital member and sign up to Arsenal Player. It's FREE and is the Home of the Game: https://arsn.al/arsenalplayer

Arsenal Football Club were formed in 1886 and amassed 13 League titles, 14 FA Cups. Some of their greatest players include: Thierry Henry, Dennis Bergkamp, Tony Adams, Ian Wright, Robert Pires, Liam Brady, Patrick Vieira, Cliff Bastin and Charlie George.

snippet.title: 'Loving son & caring friend': ACS(I) teen who died | ST NEWS NIGHT
snippet.description:
Family and friends have paid tribute to Jethro Puah, the 15-year-old Anglo-Chinese School (Independent) student who died after losing his footing during a high-element activity at Safra Yishun. https://str.sg/JrM2

snippet.title: Military takes power in Myanmar, Aung San Suu Kyi detained
snippet.description:
Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior figures from the ruling party have been detained in an early morning raid. 
The military declares a state of emergency following days of escalating tension between the civilian government and the powerful military, which claims the November election was tainted by fraud. 
 
Al JazeeraÔÇÖs Victoria Gatenby reports.

- Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/AJEnglish

snippet.title: Getting Over Our Breakups | Real Talk Season 2 Episode 15
snippet.description:
Some people burn their ex-partner's belongings, some take some alone-time, while others pick up new skills just to get over an ex-lover.

In this episode, the cast opens up about their heartbreaking experiences and the lengths they went to to get through them.

snippet.title: BIG MOMENT | RAHUL GANDHI Join In Village Cooking | Mushroom Biryani | Village Cooking Channel
snippet.description:
Today we have a Big Moment. Rahul Gandhi Joining our cooking and he encouraged us a lot. 

Today we cook mushroom biryani recipe by using traditional and healthy ingredients. Rahul Gandhi Enjoying mushroom biryani by eating with us. We never forget this big moment in our life. Thank you so much Rahul sir for this great opportunity.

snippet.title: Valentine's Day In A Hawker Centre?!
snippet.description:
We asked you what you wanted to see for the Valentine's Day episode and you guys have spoken in unison! In today's episode we bring you to 3 different hawkers that you can bring your date to even if youÔÇÖre on a budget!

Introduction 0:00

1. Breakfast Club 1:03
Address: 941 Upper Serangoon Rd, Singapore 534709
Opening hours: 9am - 9pm daily except Tuesdays

Dishes: 
Breakfast Plate $9.90
Rosti with Sausage and Egg $8.90
Pancakes $3.90
Chicken Chop $7.90

2. Yakiniku Warrior 4:57
121 Geylang East Central, Singapore 380121
Opening hours: 6-11pm daily except Thursdays
 
Dishes:
Beatbox Set 250g $12 (Beef chicken pork)
Premium Karubi Set 100g $14
Vday special A4 Wagyu 200g $48
Pork jowl 100g $6

3. The Social Outcast 11:09
The Bedok Marketplace, 348 Bedok Road, #02-21/32, Singapore 469560
Opening hours: 
Tues-Fri 5 - 11pm, Sat-Sun 11am - 11pm

Dishes:
Wagyu Truffle Burger $25
Roasted Beef Bone Marrow $12
Moluccas Beef Ribs $26

Favourites 17:25

snippet.title: What Is BLACKPINK's Routine Before Taking the Stage?
snippet.description:
James Corden welcomes his friends from BLACKPINK to The Late Late Show and Lisa tells James about the band's pre-show ritual of the low-five and the group talks about getting ready for "The Show" - their live virtual concert on their YouTube channel this weekend, featuring some of Ros├®'s new music.

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Film Theory: How WandaVision Will End And Why It Matters (Marvel)
snippet.description:
Subscribe to never miss a Film Theory! Ôû║ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH      

I am thoroughly impressed with Disney's first Marvel Disney+ show, WandaVision. The old time sitcom comedy mixed with the almost Twilight Zone feel of the mystery is just what I needed to reinvigorate the Marvel Theory side of my brain. Today Loyal Theorists, I am going to PREDICT the end of WandaVision based on all of the cluse so far - plus how I think it will shape the rest of the MCU moving forward. You won't want to miss this!

snippet.title: Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer | Panja Vaisshnav Tej | Krithi Shetty | Vijay Sethupathi | Buchi Babu
snippet.description:
Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer on Mythri Movie Makers. #Uppena Latest 2021 Telugu Movie ft. Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi and Krithi Shetty. Written & Directed by Buchi Babu Sana. Music by DSP / Devi Sri Prasad. Presented by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers & Sukumar Writings banners.

Uppena Trailer is officially released by Young Tiger NTR.

The tale of an incredible love, Uppena movie is all set for a Grand Release in theaters on February 12th, 2021.

#PanjaVaisshnavTej #VijaySethupathi #KrithiShetty #UppenaTrailer #BuchiBabuSana #DSP #DeviSriPrasad #MythriMovieMakers

snippet.title: Japanese man rents himself out offering ÔÇÿnothing in particularÔÇÖ
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

Morimoto Shoji is a 37-year-old who rents himself out for doing ÔÇ£nothing in particularÔÇØ. But, doing nothing sometimes means a great deal to people who just need some company. The Japanese man kept his interactions to a minimum as he accompanied one of his clients, who was grieving a friend at a temple in Yokohama on January 29, 2021.

snippet.title: Myanmar leaders Aung San Suu Kyi, President Win Myint and others detained in raids | ABC News
snippet.description:
Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi has been detained in an early morning raid along with other senior ruling party figures.
Subscribe: http://ab.co/1svxLVE  Read more here: https://ab.co/3j62Cud
The South-East Asian nation's new parliament was due to meet today for the first time since the November election, which was won in a landslide by Aung San Suu Kyi's party, but which the military says was marred by fraud.
National League for Democracy (NLD) spokesman Myo Nyunt said Ms Suu Kyi, President Win Myint and other leaders had been "taken" in the early hours of the morning.

ABC News provides around the clock coverage of news events as they break in Australia and abroad, including the latest coronavirus pandemic updates. It's news when you want it, from Australia's most trusted news organisation.

snippet.description:

Lyrics:

I got my drivers license last week
Just like we always talked about
ÔÇÿCause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today I drove through the suburbs
Crying 'cause you werenÔÇÖt around

And youÔÇÖre probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
SheÔÇÖs so much older than me
SheÔÇÖs everything IÔÇÖm insecure about
Yeah today I drove through the suburbs
ÔÇÿCause how could I ever love someone else

And I know we werenÔÇÖt perfect but IÔÇÖve never felt this way for no one
And I just canÔÇÖt imagine how you could be so okay now that IÔÇÖm gone
Guess you didnÔÇÖt mean what you wrote in that song about me
ÔÇÿCause you said forever now I drive alone past your street

And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you but
I kinda feel sorry for them
ÔÇÿCause theyÔÇÖll never know you the way that I do
Yeah today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

And I know we werenÔÇÖt perfect but IÔÇÖve never felt this way for no one
And I just canÔÇÖt imagine how you could be so okay now that IÔÇÖm gone
I guess you didnÔÇÖt mean what you wrote in that song about me
ÔÇÿCause you said forever now I drive alone past your street

We used to
Go to

Sidewalks
We crossed
I still hear your voice
In the traffic
WeÔÇÖre laughing
Over all the noise
God IÔÇÖm so blue
Know were through
But I still love you babe

And I just canÔÇÖt imagine how you could be so okay now that IÔÇÖm gone

snippet.title: Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho: RESULTA NG DNA TEST NG SANGGOL NA NAPALITAN DAW SA ISANG OSPITAL SA RIZAL
snippet.description:
Aired (February 7, 2021): Nitong nakaraang Linggo, itinampok natin ang kaso ng mag-asawang Aphril at Marvin na napagpalit diumano ang kanilang bagong silang na sanggol. Nag-iba raw kasi ang hitsura at ang name tag nito! Si Aphril at ang inuwi nilang sanggol, sumailalim sa DNA test.

Ang resulta ng kanilang DNA test, panoorin sa video!

'Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho' is GMA Network's highest-rating magazine show. Hosted by the country's most awarded broadcast journalist Jessica Soho, it features stories on food, urban legends, trends, and pop culture. 'KMJS' airs every Sunday, 8:25 PM on GMA Network.

Subscribe to youtube.com/gmapublicaffairs for our full episodes. #KMJS

snippet.title: CLAY POT MUTTON CURRY | Traditional Mutton Recipe Cooking in Village | Mud Pot Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
Every day, our ancestors used clay pot vessels to cook their food. Today we use a clay pot to cook our favorite mutton curry recipe. 

Clay pot gives the extraordinary smell and aroma of the food. Foods that are cook in clay pots, It's very healthy and tasty as well. We use traditional masalas, Cold-pressed gingelly oil to make the mutton recipe healthy and traditional.

Finally, we enjoy the food, the taste is delicious!!

About Sathiyam News :
Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

snippet.title: ­ƒö┤ [Watch In HD] ONE Championship: UNBREAKABLE III
snippet.description:
ONE Championship is back with another night of nonstop martial arts fights on Friday, 5 February, as ONE: UNBREAKABLE III airs right here on YouTube at 8:30 p.m. SGT (some regions excluded).

In the main event, former two-sport ONE World Champion Stamp Fairtex makes her long-awaited return to action when she faces Ukrainian submission ace Alyona Rassohyna in a massive mixed martial arts showdown!

They are joined on this electrifying card by #2-ranked bantamweight contender Shoko Sato, Brazilian phenom Fabricio Andrade, Filipino warrior Robin Catalan, Myanmar sensation Tial Thang, and more!

Check out the full card for the previously recorded event below, and make sure you tune in!

WomenÔÇÖs Atomweight Mixed Martial Arts
Stamp Fairtex vs. Alyona Rassohyna

Bantamweight Mixed Martial Arts
Shoko Sato vs. Fabricio Andrade

Strawweight Mixed Martial Arts
Ryuto Sawada vs. Robin Catalan

Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Mehdi Barghi vs. Kang Ji Won

Lightweight Mixed Martial Arts
Rahul Raju vs. Ahmed Mujtaba

Bantamweight Mixed Martial Arts
Tial Thang vs. Paul Lumihi

#ONEUnbreakable3 #ONEChampionship

snippet.title: Why we stopped uploading..
snippet.description:
Hi everyone. 

It's been a while. Sorry we've been gone for so long. Unfortunately Sonia and I are no longer together. We've been living separately for about 3 years now. We know it's been a long time and sorry we haven't addressed this sooner but things like this take time. 

Our utmost focus is making sure our boys are the highest priority in our lives. This will never change. 

We want to thank you so much for coming along this journey with us. We have enjoyed sharing every single moment of it with you all. It's been one hell of a ride. Please continue to support our seperate journeys. 

You can follow Sonia on her IG @thesonilee and I've also started my new channel which you can follow below; 

https://youtu.be/eydKkiEMeeY 

Once again, thank you all so much for the love and support you showed us on our channel. Until next time. 

Andy @andyyang84

snippet.title: Doctor Reacts To Cells At Work: Code Black Ep #1
snippet.description:
Cells At Work: Code Black was an awesome manga, and now theyÔÇÖve finally made the anime! We talk about the depressing journey of a red blood cell, platelets, an irritable stomach, the dangers of smoking, bacteria, carbon monoxide poisoning, antibiotics, and those savage white blood cells! This was just the first episode of Code Black though, which one should I watch next?

I LOVE reading your comments and take your suggestions seriously. If thereÔÇÖs a subject you want me to discuss or something youÔÇÖd like for me to react to, leave a comment down below. Many of my videos have been born out of suggestions directly from you, so donÔÇÖt hold back!

snippet.title: I Asked Bill Gates What's The Next Crisis?

snippet.title: WANDAVISION EPISODE 5 BREAKDOWN! Easter Eggs & Details You Missed (1x05 "On a Very Special Episode")
snippet.description:
WandaVision 1x05 full episode shot-by-shot analysis! What is the dark secret behind [SPOILER]'s cameo? Click HERE https://vessi.com/newrockstars ÔÇï and use my code NEWROCKSTARS to get $25 off your Vessi shoes!
Free shipping to CA, US, AUS, NZ, JP, TW, KR, SGP

SPOILERS ahead!

Check out our sweet, sweet merch! http://www.newrockstarsmerch.com
Subscribe:ÔÇï ÔÇïhttp://bit.ly/SubNewRockstarsÔÇï | Enable ALL push notifications ÔÇï ­ƒöö
Watch the NEWEST videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL4xEo4XxrSJbbjsGMSWDN62z8XB6QzHFy

WandaVisionÔÇÖs fifth episode, "On A Very Special Episode" set in the 1980s, Wanda's brother Pietro Maximoff aka Quicksilver returns to the MCU, but played by EVAN PETERS (Quicksilver from the alternate-universe Fox X-Men franchise), not Aaron Taylor Johnson from Avengers Age of Ultron (2015). What hidden details in Pietro's cameo begin to explain what's really going on with this apparent X-Men crossover? Erik Voss breaks down all the Easter Eggs you missed, including the mysterious red glow throughout the episode, Monica Rambeau's interesting history with Captain Marvel, a possible Fantastic Four reference, the even-darker backstory behind Sparky the dog, and what this episode tells us about other X-Men like Magneto, Professor X, Wolverine, or Deadpool appearing in the MCU.

localized.title: WANDAVISION EPISODE 5 BREAKDOWN! Easter Eggs & Details You Missed (1x05 "On a Very Special Episode")
localized.description:
WandaVision 1x05 full episode shot-by-shot analysis! What is the dark secret behind [SPOILER]'s cameo? Click HERE https://vessi.com/newrockstars ÔÇï and use my code NEWROCKSTARS to get $25 off your Vessi shoes!
Free shipping to CA, US, AUS, NZ, JP, TW, KR, SGP

SPOILERS ahead!

Check out our sweet, sweet merch! http://www.newrockstarsmerch.com
Subscribe:ÔÇï ÔÇïhttp://bit.ly/SubNewRockstarsÔÇï | Enable ALL push notifications ÔÇï ­ƒöö
Watch the NEWEST videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL4xEo4XxrSJbbjsGMSWDN62z8XB6QzHFy

WandaVisionÔÇÖs fifth episode, "On A Very Special Episode" set in the 1980s, Wanda's brother Pietro Maximoff aka Quicksilver returns to the MCU, but played by EVAN PETERS (Quicksilver from the alternate-universe Fox X-Men franchise), not Aaron Taylor Johnson from Avengers Age of Ultron (2015). What hidden details in Pietro's cameo begin to explain what's really going on with this apparent X-Men crossover? Erik Voss breaks down all the Easter Eggs you missed, including the mysterious red glow throughout the episode, Monica Rambeau's interesting history with Captain Marvel, a possible Fantastic Four reference, the even-darker backstory behind Sparky the dog, and what this episode tells us about other X-Men like Magneto, Professor X, Wolverine, or Deadpool appearing in the MCU.

en.description:
ÔûÂTwo Episodes every Sunday to Tuesday
Ôÿ×Watch Full EpisodeÔÿ×http://bit.ly/2YrdlpD

ÔûÂSynopsis: In a mysterious and unknown continent named "Suchuan", there are many beautiful legends of mythology. A catastrophe caused the gods to fall, and Suchuan was thrown into chaos. After many years, the young monarch Yuan Yi ascends to the throne and vows to end the troubled times. Yuan Yi believed that the source of chaos was the falling of the gods. He fled the imperial city and found a girl named Ling Long, who possesses a strong spiritual power of the god. Ling Long and her father, Chi Xin, lived in a remote village. Although Ling Long lost her mother since young, she is independent and outstanding. At the request of Yuan Yi, Chi Xin left the village with Ling Long and Yuan Yi and embarked on an adventure to save Suchuan. Evil can never rival justice, and the trio finally defeated the power of evil and led Suchuan to a beautiful new era.
ÔûÂStarring: Zhao Jin Mai, Yuan Hong, Lin Yi

snippet.title: Trump leaves office facing mounting debt, devalued assets and scarcity of willing lenders
snippet.description:
One of the consequences of the chaos of the U.S. Capitol is a distancing of banks and other business from former President Trump. He now faces a delicate and difficult situation with his businesses, debt and taxes. Paul Solman reports.

Stream your PBS favorites with the PBS app: https://to.pbs.org/2Jb8twG

snippet.title: India claim stunning series win, end Australia's Gabba streak | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
Rishabh Pant was the hero as an injury-ravaged India ended Australia's 32-year undefeated run at the Gabba, executing a record-breaking final day chase to win the Test by three wickets and the series 2-1.

snippet.title: WANDAVISION Episode 5 Breakdown & Ending Explained Spoiler Review | Marvel Easter Eggs & Theories
snippet.description:
WANDAVISION Episode 5 Breakdown & Ending Explained Spoiler Review | Marvel Easter Eggs & Theories. We review, recap and explain the fifth episode of Wandavision on Disney Plus. This contains easter eggs, theories, spoilers and a breakdown of the events and behind the scenes leaks on the Marvel property. We also discuss where the Evan Peter's Quicksilver role could be going so make sure you stay until the end.

#Wandavision #EasterEggs #EndingExplained #Quicksilver #EvanPeters #Marvel #MCU #Wanda #Vision #Episode5 #Episode6 #CaptainAmerica #IronMan #Disney #Pietro #Ultron #Darcy

If you enjoyed this video then please subscribe to the channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ?sub_confirmation=1

If You Want To Help Support The Channel So I Can Make More Videos Like This Please Donate Here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ/join

Get some awesome Heavy Spoilers show clothes, phonecases and accessories at - https://teespring.com/en-GB/stores/deffinitions-store

Shoutouts to BYND EPIC at https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8IFtZohOYLRWX6uCI5w89g

*Check out our BEST new videos below*
*Fight Club Easter Eggs* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LmMQzjJ8a5g&feature=youtu.be
*Wandavision Episode 4 Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qz1f3FQ-9Kg
*The Dark Knight Easter Eggs* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-K_bmCxUWCY&feature=youtu.be
*Godzilla Vs Kong Trailer Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oftPMViKDSU&feature=youtu.be
*Suicide Squad Ayer Cut Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s6vcyrTtzE0&feature=youtu.be


/* ----- SOCIAL MEDIA ----- */

Follow Me On Social Media At:
https://www.facebook.com/DeffinitionMC/
https://twitter.com/heavyspoilers
https://www.instagram.com/heavyspoilers/


/* ----- DISCORD ----- */

Join our Discord Community at - https://discord.gg/dDMJN4a


/* ----- VIDEO INFORMATION ----- */

Shoutouts man like Velk

Wandavision is a Disney Plus MCU Marvel Show by Kevin Feige starring Elizabeth Olsen and Paul Bettany. The Show is rumored to feature Mephisto, Agatha Harkness, The Grim Reaper and more. Every week we will be doing Wandavision breakdowns, easter egg videos, theories and ending explaineds so definitely stick around. We will also be discussing upcoming Marvel Phase 4 properties such as Spider-man 3, Loki, Falcon and The Winter Soldier, The Eternals and Black Widow.

0:00 Episode 5 Intro
0:34 Avengers Endgame Post Credits Scene
1:22 Vision And The Scarlett Witch Graphic Novel
2:04 Agnes Theories And Clues
3:34 Episode 5 Sitcom Influences
5:03 Wandavision Episode 5 Breakdown
18:04 Wandavision Episode 6 Spoilers And Leaks

Ok so Episode 4 ended with us finding out that Scarlett Witch was doing a weekend at Wanda's with Visions dead corpse. It was a mindblowing moment that set her up as the big bad but throughout the season there's been several clues that something more sinister is going on behind the scenes.

We're gonna be breaking it all down but as always Welcome to the Heavy Spoilers show I'm your host Paul aka the guy who Jimmy Woos you with my card tricks now let's get into the biggidy biggidy breakdown.

Now as always things are time coded below if you wanna skip ahead but as is usual with our breakdowns we're gonna be discussing some key theories up top.

If you've been keeping up to date with the behind the scenes stuff on the show then you'll know that the showrunner Jac Schaeffer revealed that Wandavision actually takes place almost immediately after Endgame and before the events of Far From Home.

If you checked out our video last week then you'll has seen us discussing an interview with Paul Bettany in which he revealed that Endgame originally had a post credits scene that set up the events of the show. It was supposed to close out with Wanda going to see Vision's body which was being kept in a drawer and we can see why this was cut as it happens at one point in the episode.

Vision actually didn't want to be brought back to life but Wanda doing this shows that she has completely broken his trust.

snippet.title: What Happened to China's Superstar Entrepreneur Jack Ma? | WSJ
snippet.description:
After Jack Ma criticized Chinese regulators, Beijing scuttled the initial public offering of his fintech giant Ant and he largely disappeared from public view. WSJ looks at recent videos of the billionaire to show how he got himself into trouble.

#VadiveluComedy Ó«ÄÓ«ÁÓ«│Ó»ï Ó«¿Ó»çÓ«òÓ»ìÓ«òÓ«¥ Ó«òÓ»èÓ«ñÓ»ìÓ«ñÓ»ü Ó«ÁÓ«┐Ó«ƒÓ»ìÓ«ƒÓ»üÓ«¬Ó»ïÓ«»Ó»ìÓ«ƒÓ»ìÓ«ƒÓ«¥Ó«®Ó»ì, Ó««Ó«®Ó»üÓ«ÀÓ«®Ó»üÓ«òÓ»ìÓ«òÓ»ü Ó«¬Ó»üÓ«ñÓ»ü Ó«¬Ó»üÓ«ñÓ»ü Ó«ÁÓ«┐Ó«»Ó«¥Ó«ñÓ«┐Ó«»Ó«¥ Ó«ÁÓ«░Ó»üÓ«ñÓ»ç Ó«¿Ó«¥ Ó«ÄÓ«®Ó»ìÓ«® Ó«¬Ó«úÓ»ìÓ«úÓ»üÓ«ÁÓ»çÓ«®Ó»ì | Best Comedy Video HD| CheenaThaana

Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

MovieInfo:
Directed by T. P. Gajendran
Produced by Mid Valley

snippet.title: Pori (2007) | Tamil Full Movie | Jiiva | Pooja
snippet.description:
Hari's father, a retired teacher, helps him in setting up a bookshop but a businessman from Malaysia claims that it belongs to him. As Hari begins to investigate, a real estate scam is exposed.

Directed by: Subramaniam Siva
Produced by: Sambandam Karthi
Written by: Subramaniam Siva
Starring:

Pooja
Seeman

snippet.title: Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi detained in military coup | DW News
snippet.description:
The military has carried out a coup d'├®tat in Myanmar. They've seized control of the country and detained key government officials, including the country's defacto leader, Aung San Suu Kyi. The military accuses the government of failing to act on claims of voter fraud in last November's election. They announced emergency via the news channel they own in Myanmar.

en-US.title: Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi detained in military coup | DW News
en-US.description:
The military has carried out a coup d'├®tat in Myanmar. They've seized control of the country and detained key government officials, including the country's defacto leader, Aung San Suu Kyi. The military accuses the government of failing to act on claims of voter fraud in last November's election. They announced emergency via the news channel they own in Myanmar.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Southampton vs Arsenal (1-3) | Pepe, Saka & Lacazette fire us to victory
snippet.description:
We came from behind to claim all three points on the road and make it six games without defeat in the Premier League.

The forward line was in excellent form all evening with Nicolas Pepe, Bukayo Saka and Alexandre Lacazette all on target as we gained swift revenge for the weekend's FA Cup defeat here at St Mary's.

The Saints needed just three minutes to open the scoring, but we should have been ahead even before that. Granit Xhaka released Lacazette into the box, but the Frenchman's low shot was saved by the legs of Alex McCarthy as he bore down on goal.

The miss was compounded when the hosts went ahead through a thumping Stuart Armstrong volley from James Ward-Prowse's out-swinging corner.

We maintained our intensity though and got on terms through Pepe, who kept his cool inside the box to slide the ball into the corner after being set up by Xhaka.

Chances kept coming and it was certainly a more entertaining match than the FA Cup game here just three days ago, with Pepe and Saka seeing plenty of the ball on the wings.

The game eventually settled down, though it remained entertaining with both sides pushing men forward.

We went into the break in the lead thanks to a wonderful goal from Saka. Lacazette fed the youngster with a perfectly weighted pass, and the England man did the rest ÔÇô skipping past McCarthy and then calmly rolled the ball home right footed from outside the box. It was his fourth goal in his last six league starts - he is certainly enjoying life on the right wing.

It was a much more measured start to the second half. The game was on a knife edge as the hosts began to peg us back.

But our third goal killed their impetus. The impressive Cedric found Saka on the opposite flank, and his low cross was converted from close range by Lacazette.

Bernd Leno made a superb save from a Ward-Prowse free-kick late on and Rob Holding tackled Che Adams in the area as Southampton made us work until the last minute for the three points that lift us to eighth.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #bukayosaka #nicolaspepe

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Mesut Ozil, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter

snippet.title: Why Myanmar's military overthrew the nationÔÇÖs democratically elected government
snippet.description:
The Biden administration has threatened to reimpose sanctions on Myanmar after the military there staged a coup over the weekend. Derek Mitchell, the former U.S. ambassador to Myanmar during the Obama administration who is now the president of the National Democratic Institute for International Affairs, joins Nick Schifrin to discuss.

snippet.title: GameStop Mania: How Reddit Traders Took On Wall Street
snippet.description:
GameStop has captivated Wall StreetÔÇÖs attention. The stockÔÇÖs rise has been otherworldly. But the obsession isnÔÇÖt just with the rally, itÔÇÖs with whoÔÇÖs making money off of it. Legions of individual investors -- regular, everyday people -- gathered on social platforms like Reddit and decided to send GameStop stock, as they would say, to the moon. This week, GameStop shares soared 400%, a hedge fund had to get bailed out, and online trading platforms had to restricting trading on GameStop and other hot stocks. HereÔÇÖs how the GameStop saga played out, and whatÔÇÖs next as lawmakers turn their sights on the story that took over Wall Street this week.

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceXÔÇÖs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ÔÇô approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipÔÇÖs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: Nets v Clippers: The Most INTENSE NBA Game This Season
snippet.description:
For more info on the BBALLBREAKDOWN YT Membership: https://bit.ly/3rmJwUBr
Coach Nick breaks down the most marquee match up we've had this season as Kawhi Leonard, Kevin Durant, Paul George, Kyrie Irving, and James Harden all shared the court together, and the game went down to the wire with some intriguing matchups and questionable decisions.
SUBSCRIBE HERE FOR MORE: http://bit.ly/BBallSub
MUSIC: Fighting For Freedom by Anno Domini
ABOUT BBALLBREAKDOWN
BBallBreakdown is devoted to deep-dive analysis of NBA basketball gameplay. If you're a coach or a player, check out the MONTHLY MEMBERSHIP - filled with an ever growing library of on court demos designed to help you improve your play and your coaching! Giving fans a taste of a pro coach's film session, host Coach Nick breaks down fundamentals, play calling, offense, defense, shooting form, officiating, and everything else basketball.  In addition, see exclusive interviews with NBA players and coaches, from active super stars to retired legends.
